In a number of dialects of British English, a glide is
inserted in certain environments, as shown in (1) and (2).

being /bi…™≈Л/ [bij…™≈Л]

(2) /w/ insertion

go away /go К…Щwe…™/ [go Кw…Щwe…™]
However, in such dialects, glide insertion is not attested in
the examples in (3). Instead, /…є/ is inserted.
(3) No glide insertion

Note: * indicates a non-permissible form.
